description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix job that builds and tests with CMake across multiple OS (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest), build types (Release, Debug), and C++ compilers (g++, clang++, cl), while excluding certain compiler and OS combinations. Checkout the repository, set up reusable strings for build output directories, configure CMake with specific compiler and build settings, build the project, and run tests with ctest.
